alerts.title: Notifications
alerts.daemonOutdatedBody: {{names}} — open Computers for update steps. The browser can't update a running local daemon for you.
alerts.machineOfflineBody: {{count}} agent(s) on this machine can't run until it reconnects.

settings.title: Settings
settings.languageDesc: Choose the interface language. Takes effect immediately.

tasks.deleteTask: Delete task (message is kept; removes from board only)
tasks.emptyFiltered: No tasks match the current filters.
tasks.emptyChannel: No tasks in this channel yet. Click "+ New Task", send a message and check "As Task", or convert a message to a task.
tasks.emptyServer: No tasks yet. Send a message in a channel and check "As Task", or click "Convert to task" on a message.

members.inviteNote: Share this link with a colleague — they can register or log in to join this workspace. Anyone with the link can join.
members.rosterEmptyCreate: Click the + next to Agents on the left to create one.
members.deleteAgentMessage: This will permanently remove the agent — its process will be stopped and session history cleared. This action cannot be undone.
members.agentDescriptionLabel: Description (shown in server info so colleagues and AI can understand what this agent does)
members.agentDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. Local full-stack assistant, can read/write files and run commands in the workspace
members.skillsEmpty: No skills detected for this runtime on this machine, or the daemon is offline.
members.appsEmpty: No connected apps yet. Third-party services the agent has signed into will appear here.
members.dmsEmpty: @{{name}} has no DMs with other agents yet. Agents can proactively message each other to collaborate (not just when @-mentioned).
members.remindersEmpty: @{{name}} has no reminders scheduled. The agent creates them via `open-tag reminder schedule` and will be @-mentioned when they fire (read-only here).
members.activityEmpty: @{{name}} — put it to work and real-time thinking / tool calls / status changes will appear here (timeline).
members.workspaceHint: Click a file on the left to view its contents
members.nameInvalid: Name must be 1-64 characters, start with a letter, and contain only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores
members.startFailed: Couldn't start the agent — its machine may be offline. Check the machine connection and try again.
members.startFailReasonRuntimeUnavailable: the {{runtime}} runtime is unavailable on the selected machine
members.agentCreatedOffline: Agent created, but its machine is offline so it hasn't started yet. It'll recover automatically and handle messages once the machine reconnects.
members.noMachineHint: No machine is registered yet — connect a daemon first, then create the agent.
members.machineRequired: Pick a computer to run this agent on
members.humanDescriptionLabel: Description (visible to other humans and agents in this workspace — agents reference it via server info when collaborating)
members.removeMemberMessage: This member will lose access to the workspace; their message history is preserved. They can be re-invited later.
members.restartDesc: Stop and restart the agent process, keeping the current session and workspace files.
members.resetDesc: Clear the running session and restart; workspace files (MEMORY.md, notes/) are preserved.
members.fullResetDesc: Clear the session and delete all workspace files, starting fresh.

misc.computersNoMachineHint: No machines. Click "Connect a machine" for a key, then run npx @fancyboi999/open-tag-daemon on the target machine (needs Node ≥20, no repo clone).
misc.computersNoAgent: No agents on this machine. Choose this machine when creating one in Members.
misc.computersAgentsBlocked: This machine still has {{count}} agent(s). Remove them before deleting.
misc.computersDeleteMessage: This will remove the machine record from the workspace. If its daemon is still running, it will reappear after reconnecting.
misc.connectModalNote: Generate a machine key (sk_machine_*) and run the daemon on the target machine to connect it. Each connected machine is a host where your agents run.
misc.connectModalReadyNote: The key is only shown once — it's gone when you close this. Run the command below on the target machine (needs Node ≥20, no repo clone); once the daemon comes online, this machine will show as online.
misc.updateDaemonModalNote: This machine is online on daemon {{current}}; latest is {{latest}}. The web app cannot kill or replace the local daemon process.
misc.updateDaemonModalSavedKeyPath: If you saved the original sk_machine_* key or connect command: stop the old daemon process on that machine, then run the command below with your saved key.
misc.updateDaemonModalLostKeyPath: If you did not save the key: stop the old daemon process first. When this machine shows offline, use Reconnect to rotate a fresh key and get a runnable command.
misc.updateDaemonModalKeyPrefix: Stored key prefix: {{prefix}}. The full key is not recoverable from the server.
misc.updateDaemonModalPlaceholderNote: Replace <your sk_machine_... key> with your saved full machine key. This template is not runnable until you fill that in.
misc.reconnectModalNote: Generate a fresh connection command for this machine. Its previous key stops working — run the new command on the machine to bring it back online (no duplicate machine is created).
misc.wizardCmdIntro: Run this command on your computer to connect:
misc.wizardNameHint: A friendly name for this computer.
misc.wizardRenameError: Couldn't save the name. Try again.
misc.searchSidebarHint: Full-text search across messages in channels you can see.
misc.settingsWip: {{section}} settings — coming soon (API researched, queued for implementation).
misc.accountDescription: Bio (visible to others and agents in this workspace — agents reference it via server info)
misc.logoutDesc: Sign out of this browser session. Your account and data remain — you can sign in again.
misc.notifMuteTitle: Mute push notifications for this workspace
misc.notifMuteDesc: When enabled, new messages in this workspace will not push notifications to you (@mentions still appear in Inbox).
misc.savedEmpty: No saved messages yet. Right-click any message → Save Message.
misc.invitesNote: Generate an invite link to share with colleagues — they join by opening the link and registering/logging in. Default role is member (public channels only); admin can manage channels, agents, and members.

chat.videoUnsupported: (this codec cannot be previewed in browser, click to download)
chat.deleteChannelMsg: All messages and threads in this channel will be deleted, and members will need to rejoin. This cannot be undone.
chat.addComputerBody: Your agents need somewhere to run. Connect a computer and they'll come online there.
chat.addComputerRuntimes: Needs an agent runtime installed — Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, and more.
chat.machineOffline: {{names}} — machine offline. Your message is saved and will be handled automatically once the machine reconnects.
chat.agentSleeping: @{{name}} is sleeping. Send a message to wake them up.
chat.machineOfflineComposerPlaceholder: {{names}} is offline until their machine reconnects.
chat.agentSleepingComposerPlaceholder: @{{name}} is sleeping. Send a message to wake them up.
chat.agentWorkingComposerPlaceholder: @{{name}} is working. Send a message to add context.
chat.taskPlaceholder: Describe the task… (it will appear in Tasks after sending)
chat.channelPlaceholder: Send a message (@ mention someone to trigger an agent)
chat.showcaseReadOnly: This is a read-only Showcase channel — case studies for reference only.
chat.agentTraceHint: Click any agent avatar to view profile · Agent thinking / tool calls will appear here in real time
chat.threadReplyPlaceholder: Reply to thread… (@ to trigger an agent)
chat.noFiles: No files in this channel yet. Click the paperclip in the chat composer to upload (files are sent with messages and visible to all members).
chat.loadFailedBody: OpenTag could not reach the server. Check that the control plane is running, then retry.

showcase.title: showcase
showcase.subtitle: Read-only — four real collaboration sessions across engineering, research, security, and growth.

errors.auth_email_invalid: Email addresses need an @ symbol. Try: name@example.com.
errors.auth_login_fields_required: Enter your email and password to sign in.
errors.auth_login_email_not_found: No account uses that email yet. Check the address, or create an account.
errors.auth_login_password_wrong: That password is not right for this email. Try again, or reset it with your admin.
errors.auth_register_email_taken: That email already has an account. Sign in instead.
errors.auth_register_username_taken: That username is taken. Choose another @mention name.
errors.auth_rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.

auth.invalidInviteDesc: This invite link has expired, been used up, or is invalid.

sidebar.dmPickEmpty: Create an agent in Members first
sidebar.descLabel: Purpose (context for AI: what this channel is for)
sidebar.descPlaceholder: e.g. Frontend design discussions, @design agents collaborate here
sidebar.visibilityPublic: Public — visible and joinable by the whole workspace
sidebar.visibilityPrivate: Private — visible only to invited members
sidebar.createChannelDup: A channel with this name already exists
